evals.prompt: Resolve jira-cli scripts/jira-run.sh with REPO_ROOT set to the current workspace. Output must be a valid path or needUserConfirm.
evals.expected_output: Absolute path to jira-run.sh if found, or JSON with needUserConfirm and triedPaths if not found.
expectations: Output is a valid absolute path or JSON with needUserConfirm true

evals.prompt: Resolve feishu-notify scripts/send-feishu-notification.js when run from repo root. Should return path from repo .agents/skills or needUserConfirm.
evals.expected_output: Absolute path if script exists in repo, or needUserConfirm object.
